linkedin.text:
Five countries. Five identical brand experiences. Six days. One team that owned all of it.

The brief was a product roadshow that had to feel exactly the same in Madrid, Milan, Frankfurt, Amsterdam and Paris — same staging, same lighting, same run-of-show — while every city brought its own venue rules, customs, suppliers and language.

We ran it as a single moving operation: 1 touring crew, 5 venues secured, 14 tonnes of kit cleared across borders, 2,300 guests hosted, and a sub-15-minute set-change window held in every city. Zero days lost.

The outcome: consistent brand impact in five markets and a client who stopped juggling five local agencies. That's the value of one accountable team. From business to pleasure.

Planning a multi-market rollout for 2026? DM us or book a call.

#CorporateEvents #EventProduction #Roadshow #IncentiveTravel

image_prompt: A touring event crew loading flight cases and staging kit from a branded truck into a European convention venue at early dawn, breath visible in cool air, forklifts and cabling in motion, a sense of disciplined logistics under soft blue morning light. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
